# Interim data (generated by pipeline)

Files in this folder are **created by scripts**, not edited by hand.

| File | Created by | Purpose |
|------|------------|---------|
| `manifest.csv` | `--stage manifest` | File paths, labels, content hashes, split assignments |
| `splits.json` | `--stage split` | Seed, ratios, per-split counts (frozen record) |
| `dedup_report.csv` | `--stage manifest` or `--stage split` | Optional duplicate image log |

These files are gitignored once generated (see root `.gitignore`).
